steps: Submit Form 5001 to French tax authorities requesting WHT reimbursement of EUR 3,744.00 on TotalEnergies SE dividends under FR-NO treaty 15% rate
Include BNP Paribas custodian statement showing 13.5% tax withheld (EUR 33,696) vs treaty-allowed 15% on EUR 249,600 gross
Provide Norwegian tax residency certificate to support treaty benefit eligibility for CLIENT08
Follow up with French tax administration within 3 months if no response on overpayment recovery

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
